data.label: pcre2
data.description: PCRE2 库是一组 C 函数，用于实现正则表达式模式匹配。它是自包含的、可移植的，并且设计上易于嵌入到现有的项目和构建系统中，几乎可以在任何平台或构建目标上使用。

data.label: pcre2
data.description: The PCRE2 library is a set of C functions that implement regular expression pattern matching. It is self-contained and portable, and designed to be easy to embed into existing projects and build systems, on almost any platform or build target.
